ops.title: prek program: ship hook gate + .pre-commit-config.yaml as cc-guides rendered artifact
ops.body:
Landed 2026-07-16 (plan: ccx-vcs-ship-should-declarative-turing).

**ship hook gate (ccx v0.26.0)**: `ccx vcs ship` runs `uvx prek run --cd <root> --files <derived>` between staging and commit, both vcs kinds. Auto-fix-then-verify: nonzero first run → re-stage (git) + re-derive + one retry; clean retry = "hooks fixed" (fixes fold into the commit); still red = abort before commit/push; retry-derive empty = "auto-fixes reverted every pending change" error. `--no-verify` skips prek AND reaches every git commit argv (incl. hunk-select). Segments: hooks ok/fixed/hunk-skip/uvx-missing/no-git. Key frames: jj derivation runs pinned to repo root via render.RunCLIDir (jj emits cwd-relative paths — unpinned, a subdir ship silently derived an empty list and skipped hooks); scoped paths are rebased root-relative for the diff argv only; git lane is NUL-split (`-z`) against quotePath mangling; existence filter is Lstat (broken symlinks stay hookable). Hunk-scoped ships never run prek (external prek sees full worktree files, not the partial selection) — visible "hooks hunk-skip" instead. Open question deliberately not changed: plain ship of an empty @ still creates+pushes an empty jj commit (message-only --amend depends on the adjacent silent-skip path).

**Rendered-config model**: `.pre-commit-config.yaml` is now a cc-guides artifact composed from cc-skills pack fragments `plugin/guides/yml/precommit-{base,go,python,swift}.yml` (KindYAML: `.yml` canonical for pack fragments, `.yaml` accepted for targets since cc-guides v0.1.27; sh-style `# ` marker, textual concatenation, never merged). precommit-base owns the `repos:` key + prek-native `repo: builtin` hygiene hooks (--maxkb=1024 for gen-image banners, --markdown-linebreak-ext=md); language fragments are indented list continuations; rev pins are centrally managed — local `prek autoupdate` is drift and the daily cron reverts it. Configs are prek-only (`repo: builtin` breaks legacy pre-commit).

**Repo-local overrides**: a local `*.fragment.yml` can carry a TOP-LEVEL key (concatenation is textual) — cc-steer's `exclude: ^tests/fixtures/` fragment is the pattern for byte-exact fixtures that hygiene hooks must not rewrite (its one-time hygiene pass broke test_build_prompt_matches_the_byte_fixture by appending a final newline). Imported fragment hook args can NOT be overridden downstream — divergent repos import base only and keep their lint hooks as local fragments (yclaw pattern).

**Sweep recipe gotchas**: hygiene `prek run --all-files` only on fully-clean trees (it edits concurrent sessions' dirty files otherwise); full render only (scoped render freezes pins); delete the handwritten config before first render (no marker = clobber guard); a parked retrofit commit after a rolled-back ship rebase is regenerable — abandon + re-run beats conflict surgery.
